final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of the Battle of Red Cliffs from the Three Kingdoms period.

Style/medium: needs a children's educational illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be single large knowledge card format with clear title placement and side-listed bullet points
Subject: must include the Battle of Red Cliffs story content presented in cartoon storytelling format
Scene/backdrop: needs a historical battle scene direction — exact environmental details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a child-friendly, engaging atmosphere — exact mood balance is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, child-appropriate direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include a clear title and bullet-pointed key facts with punctuation
Constraints: must preserve educational accuracy of the Battle of Red Cliffs story, must be suitable for children, single card format
Avoid:
